description: Fix three user-reported issues: (1) Remove extra 'Career Lab Consulting' text and Admin Panel button from index.html, (2) Fix eye detection to properly reset after first warning using debounce/hysteresis, (3) Replace generic action cards on result page with dynamic topicwise study plan.
steps: Remove 'Career Lab Consulting' text from nav-brand in base.html (keep only logo image)
Remove Admin Panel button from hero-actions in index.html
Fix eye_detection.js: add gazeAtScreenFrames counter with hysteresis (3+ consecutive frames = 1.5s before resetting distraction state)
Update exam.py exam_result endpoint to calculate topic_performance from answers and pass it to template
Replace generic action cards in exam_result.html with dynamic topicwise study plan showing weak topics and what to study
acceptance_criteria: No duplicate 'Career Lab Consulting' text appears below navbar brand
Admin Panel button removed from index.html hero section
Eye detection properly detects multiple distraction events (not just first one)
Eye detection requires 3+ consecutive looking-at-screen frames before resetting state
Result page shows dynamic topicwise study plan for topics below 75%
